subject: Multiple humanoid figures crawling or slumped on broad stone stairs leading to a monumental temple or civic building
description: A wide stone staircase dominates the scene, leading up to a massive columned building. A figure in ragged robes is in the foreground, face slack, body braced against the steps as though barely able to move. Behind them, several other figures are similarly hunched, crawling, or collapsed on the stairs. The architecture is classical Greek in style — tall columns, a grand doorway — and the overall light is grey and oppressive. The figures appear drained, listless, barely capable of movement.
foreground: A slumped humanoid figure in tattered robes braced against stone steps
background: Grand columned temple; more figures on the stairs; overcast sky
emotion: despair and utter exhaustion — bodies barely moving, faces downcast
